/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/jfbview.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/jfbview.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/jfbview.dir/jpdfgrep.cpp.o CMakeFiles/jfbview.dir/jpdfcat.cpp.o -o jfbview   -L/home/bat/src/jfbview/vendor/mupdf/build/release  -Wl,-rpath,/home/bat/src/jfbview/vendor/mupdf/build/release: libjfbview_document_viewer.a libjfbview_document.a -lmupdf -lmupdf-third /usr/lib/libjpeg.so /usr/lib/libharfbuzz.so /usr/lib/libfreetype.so /usr/lib/libz.so /usr/lib/libopenjp2.so /usr/lib/libncursesw.so /usr/lib/libformw.so
